markdown:
#  Deactivate or Reactivate a User in Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Team** page.
  3. See the steps below depending on whether you need to deactivate or reactivate a user.


#### Deactivate a User
  1. Click the name of the user that you want to deactivate.
  2. Click **Deactivate**.
  3. Click **Deactivate** to confirm that you want to deactivate the user.  
_Note:_ The user will no longer be able to log in to their Procore account, but will remain listed in projects. You can reactivate them later if needed.


#### Reactivate a User
  1. Click the name of the user that you want to reactivate.
  2. Click **Reactivate**.
  3. Click **Reactivate** to confirm that you want to reactivate the user.  
_Note:_ The user will be able to log in to their Procore account and access any active projects they were previously added to.


## See Also
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * [How do permissions work for free Procore accounts?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-permissions-work-for-free-procore-accounts)
  * [Search for and Filter Users in Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-users-in-your-free-procore-account)
title: Deactivate or Reactivate a User in Your Free Procore Account
description: How to deactivate or reactivate a user on the Team page in your free Procore account.
